title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 27–31, this part focuses on Unknown person #21, Unknown person #22, Yamato, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #24 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: The motif has gotta be "fire"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and it should have a big *a* for *ace*!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And who doesn't love spaghetti, it's delicious! We've gotta let the skull eat some!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Captain, you're the worst...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems like your artistic abilities never evolved beyond drawing stick figures.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: This ship will be known as...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The "piece of Spadille"!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: My name is Portgas D. Ace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: But before I knew it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I set sail with huge ambitions...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But what accomplish- ments do I carry upon my back?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Absolutely nothing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I came here for one purpose...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I started to feel something I didn't expect.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that if I stayed here, I might finally discover...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: What I was always yearwing for...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I humbly ask of you, please bestow your mark...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: ...upon this empty back of mine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: have faith in me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Pops!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You've really grown up...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure my skull and crossbones have no complaints either!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Gura Rara...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Congra- TULATIONS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: These two men that sit before you...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
